name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 24 Oct 2024
body: [{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW:","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Greetings Maropostians!!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"We have introduced a new feature in Marketing Cloud that will help you acquire a more comprehensive understanding of your contacts' daily interactions with your businesses and brands."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more, read ahead!! "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"NEW FEATURE:","bold":true}]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"eRFM Analysis Report","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"We have launched a phase 1 iteration of the eRFM ("},{"text":"recency, frequency, monetary,","bold":true},{"text":" and "},{"text":"engagement insights","bold":true},{"text":") report feature that consists of an engagement and RFM insights chart describing various contact groups engaging with your business at distinct levels whether it be subscribing to a newsletter, clicking on a product survey link, or completing a purchase at checkout. This data is available in real-time, showcasing customer behavioral insight, and the count changes dynamically depending on the date selected."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/erfm10.068J1000005ajGGIAY.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/erfm10.068J1000005ajGGIAY.png","name":"erfm10","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1747,"width":2880}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The chart gives an intuitive visual representation of how your brands and marketing strategies are being perceived by different sections of your contacts. This enables you to make data-driven decisions and gives you vivid marketing approaches for a diverse audience. For example, if the overall count of your most sought-after customers has dwindled in the past few days, you can take action by creating a segment of such contacts and bringing them back into the campaign funnel through a loyalty exclusive voucher or a winback email notifications program."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/erfm9.068J1000005ajGsIAI.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/erfm9.068J1000005ajGsIAI.png","name":"erfm9","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1307,"width":2880}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The chart also gives you the flexibility to modify your contact group names as per the type of audience you cater to."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/erfm8.068J1000005ajHRIAY.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/erfm8.068J1000005ajHRIAY.png","name":"erfm8","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1282,"width":2880}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more about this feature, read our "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Unlock-Customer-Insights-with-eRFM-Analysis","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"eRFM Report","bold":true}]},{"text":" article."}]}]}]
